name: session-feedback
summary: UserPromptSubmit hook that makes the loop visible. Runs the orchestrator loop on the typed prompt and prints the trace back into the session (signal extracted -> classified -> estimated -> routed -> outcome). Sole writer of record/signals.jsonl via the loop. FAIL-OPEN: never blocks a turn.

admission.note: Candidate. Wired in .claude/settings.json (a wired candidate is still a candidate). NOT admitted.

input.description: A Claude Code UserPromptSubmit payload on stdin.

output.description: One visible trace line printed to the session.

exit: Prints the trace and exits 0 — always (fail-open).
invariants: Fail-open: any error is swallowed; the turn proceeds untouched.
The visible trace reproduces for the same input (only the per-stream index #n varies).
Sole writer of record/signals.jsonl (signal-ledger is not wired alongside it).
